title: Canal-Exchange Routing: Minimum Batch Swaps on a Reservoir Grid
strategies: naive fixed-order router, walk batch a to batch b per operation (trivial == checker baseline)
nearest-first scheduling of the commuting operations (greedy)
SABRE-style shared-exchange routing over the pending set, best of several lookahead widths (strong)
true minimum-exchange routing / token-swap optimum (NP-hard, open ceiling, uncovered)
